'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/sitemap-0.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=eg_ZtGJjimabNpi.MFGWa7sQ92nuw9bQjYT9bGrENYY-1776572049-1.0.1.1-2Vbu4saRMlSsfPM41nGr49dB.k.nBZZbhNk_9KAOk90"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
